SSS2 Physics — Mechanics
This scheme covers the mechanics topics for SSS2 Term 1.

The following topics will be taught:
- Scalars and vectors
- Newton's Laws of Motion  
- Projectile motion
- Work, energy and power
- Simple machines

Teachers should use practical demonstrations where possible. Assessment will be done through tests and examinations.

Students should be encouraged to participate actively in lessons and complete all assignments.
reference: NERDC SSS2 Physics Scheme of Work for Term 1 covering Mechanics with weekly breakdown, topic-level learning objectives, activities, and assessments.
subject: physics
